description: Fix dead code in registry.py (add_debate_message after return), improve Kelly criterion calculation, add cache invalidation/force-refresh to data.py, and fix CSS z-index/overflow issues in dashboard
steps: 1. In src/augur/registry.py, fix the dead code at line 458: the add_debate_message method code appears AFTER a return statement inside get_consensus(). The code at lines 457-459 should be extracted as a proper method on DecisionCoordinator class. Move: (a) add def add_debate_message(self, msg: DebateMessage): self._debate_history.append(msg) as a separate method BEFORE get_debate_history(), and (b) remove the dead code lines from inside get_consensus().

2. In src/augur/data.py, add a force_refresh parameter to fetch_market_context(ticker, force_refresh=False) that bypasses the cache when True. Also add a public clear_cache() function and a cache_info() function that returns cache size and TTL. This allows stale data to be explicitly cleared.
3. In src/augur/data.py, reduce _CACHE_TTL from 300 to 180 seconds (3 minutes) for more timely data during market hours while still avoiding excessive API calls.

4. In dashboard/app.py, add a new API endpoint GET /api/cache/clear that calls clear_cache() from augur.data and returns {status: ok, message: 'Cache cleared'}. Also add GET /api/cache/info that returns cache size and TTL.

5. In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css, fix the following CSS issues: (a) Add overflow-x: hidden to .app-main to prevent horizontal scrollbar when content overflows. (b) Add text-overflow: ellipsis and max-width constraints to agent names and ticker displays to prevent long names from breaking layouts. (c) Add z-index: 1001 to the toast-container so toasts always appear above the sidebar. (d) On mobile (max-width: 768px), ensure bottom-nav has z-index higher than page content.
6. In dashboard/templates/base.html, add a style for .toast-container with position:fixed; z-index:1001; top:16px; right:16px; to ensure toasts don't stack behind sidebar.

7. Add comprehensive tests in tests/test_iteration8.py covering: (a) add_debate_message is callable and works, (b) data.py cache clearing works, (c) data.py cache TTL is 180, (d) force_refresh bypasses cache, (e) API /api/cache/clear endpoint, (f) API /api/cache/info endpoint, (g) Kelly criterion edge cases (score exactly 5, bearish signal, neutral with low confidence)
acceptance_criteria: add_debate_message is a proper method on DecisionCoordinator accessible from outside
DebateProtocol's _generate_debate_messages no longer crashes because add_debate_message now exists
fetch_market_context(ticker, force_refresh=True) skips the cache and fetches fresh data
GET /api/cache/info returns cache size and TTL
All 251+ existing tests continue to pass plus new tests
verification: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/projects/sandbox/augur/src'); from augur.registry import DecisionCoordinator; c = DecisionCoordinator(); print(hasattr(c, 'add_debate_message'))" should print True
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/projects/sandbox/augur/src'); from augur.data import clear_cache, cache_info; clear_cache(); print(cache_info())" should work
